data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: WhatsApp’s streamlined UI reduces user decision time by minimizing options.
data.technical_spec: Simple navigation with clear, concise menu options.

data.title: Fitt’s Law
data.description: Optimizes user experience by placing frequent actions within easy reach on the interface.
data.technical_spec: Larger touch targets and thumb-friendly zones.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect your site to work the same way as all the other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design patterns and interaction models used across the app.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits the amount of information presented at once to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Chunking of information and clear segmentation in chats.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design gives a better first impression and slower manifestation of usability issues.
data.technical_spec: Modern design with focus on minimalism and visual balance.
